lore.blusbeasts.infested_netherrack: This Block is infested by all kinds of bugs. Mobs don't like walking over it.
lore.blusbeasts.end_wyvern_egg: The Egg of an end Wyvern. Place on Nest blocks to make it hatch.
lore.blusbeasts.end_wyvern_nest: A nest made out of Chorus Plants. End Wyverns love it.
lore.blusbeasts.void_ore: A Stone block that has a gaping void inside of it. Sometimes absorbs other ores.
lore.blusbeasts.void_ore_magnet: This machine breaks ores in its vacinity when powered by redstone.
lore.blusbeasts.plate: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_crystal: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_donut: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_horns: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_leach: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_lightning: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_mimicart: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_pheromones: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_pixie: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_sand: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_sapling: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_scarab: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_shroom: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_squid: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_void: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.plate_wings: A Plate where items can be placed on. Dream Pixies enjoy food on plates.
lore.blusbeasts.bluebells: These flowers grow in circle formations around what seems like arbitrary points.
lore.blusbeasts.grave_red_sandstone: This Smooth Red Sandstone seems to have some crystal embedded within it.
lore.blusbeasts.grave_sandstone: This Smooth Sandstone seems to have some crystal embedded within it.
lore.blusbeasts.pixie_torch: This colorful torch sprays confetti around.
lore.blusbeasts.rainbow_wool: This wool is imbued by pixie essence making it cycle through the rainbow.
lore.blusbeasts.rainbow_carpet: This carpet is imbued by pixie essence making it cycle through the rainbow.
lore.blusbeasts.rainbow_concrete: This concrete is imbued by pixie essence making it cycle through the rainbow.
lore.blusbeasts.salamander_scales: These scales can be dropped from Salamanders when they scratch themself. Not very heat-resistant.
lore.blusbeasts.end_takoyaki: Little snacks from the end. Squids make these.
lore.blusbeasts.embedded_crystals: These crystals can be placed in your arm. When equipped lets you break budding crystals.
lore.blusbeasts.antlers: This is just a cosmetic item.
lore.blusbeasts.golden_antlers: These antlers makes you very attractive. While wearing them, animals like to follow you.
lore.blusbeasts.prayfinder_feather: This is a feather of a prayfinder. Holding it makes a bit aggressive.
lore.blusbeasts.living_wheels: These wheels seem to have a problem rotating. The pink goop is blocking the wheels.
lore.blusbeasts.personal_minecart: This clever item can be equipped on the back, with it, rails can be right clicked to instantly deploy a minecart.
lore.blusbeasts.pickerang: This Pickaxe like implement can be thrown to break blocks far away.
lore.blusbeasts.chimera_core: This item can be used to collect mobs that make up a chimera and then summon it.
lore.blusbeasts.infested_arrow: This Arrow spawns an aggressive bug when it hits a target.
lore.blusbeasts.burrow_rod: A Rod from a Burry. It seems to change its weight irregularly.
lore.blusbeasts.burrow_gem: The core of a Burry. It gives the burry its life.
lore.blusbeasts.gravity_dust: This dust has interesting properties. When used on a block, th block falls down.
lore.blusbeasts.scarab_dormant: A symbol of power in the desert. Give it to a Burry to empower it.
lore.blusbeasts.scarab: This awakened Relic can be used for a tool that returns.
lore.blusbeasts.pickerang_upgrade_templa: Use this template to upgrade a pickaxe into a pickerang
lore.blusbeasts.miners_snack: These Fish live in caves. They all have different flavours that can help or hinder when eaten. Place them down in water.
lore.blusbeasts.cooked_miners_snack: A cooked Miners snack looses all its unique flavours, but is still delicious.
lore.blusbeasts.miners_snack_bucket: A Bucket filled with a miners snack.
lore.blusbeasts.fish_bone_skewer: Miners use these Fishbones instead of sticks in a pinch.
lore.blusbeasts.fairy_dust: This Dust is left by pixies when you give them food. Its used for crafting.
lore.blusbeasts.grave_gem: This gemstone is found in the boulders that graves throw around.
lore.blusbeasts.party_popper: This item can be used to throw confetti around.
lore.blusbeasts.glitter_bomb: This bomb can be thrown to make an area of effect where confetti falls down and mobs are glowing.
lore.blusbeasts.magic_wand: This wand transforms you into a magical girl, letting you heal mobs from ill effects and damage.
lore.blusbeasts.packwing: These flying mobs can be tamed with glowberries and are able to hold items. When given an item named after a player they fly over to deliver it.
lore.blusbeasts.salamander: These Lizards have a lot of heat within them, using it to smelt items lying around. They also sometimes scratch themself on blocks and drop their scales.
lore.blusbeasts.end_squid: These mischievious Squids fly around on the end. Don't le them hitch a ride back.
lore.blusbeasts.echo_crab: These Crabs are created when Amethyst Crabs get mutated by a Sculk Catalys. They grow echo shards on their back.
lore.blusbeasts.amethyst_crab: These crabs can sometimes generate from budding amethysts. They slowly grow amethyst crystals on their back, when on geode blocks.
lore.blusbeasts.mycelium_toad: These toads have mushrooms growing on their backs. If you feed them enough meat, they fall asleap and grow a mushroom when waking up.
lore.blusbeasts.prayfinder: These birds attract aggresive mobs to the location of their target. You can avoid them by wearing items they like or tame them to use their power for yourself.
lore.blusbeasts.mimicart: These curious monsters spawn in abandoned mineshafts, disguising themself as minecarts. Once sat in or attacked they attack back.
lore.blusbeasts.living_lightning: These passive monsters only spawn during thunderstorms under clear sky. Bottles can be used to extract lightning from them. But beware, if angered this or another way, they shoot lightning arcs.
lore.blusbeasts.nether_leach: These Leaches live in the nether and like to transform things into their nether variant. If they try to convert players they sneak into their inventory, damaging them and giving fire resistance.
lore.blusbeasts.end_wyvern: These Flying creatures build their nests in the end, never leaving to far from their home. If they see a player falling near their home, they fly over to catch them.
lore.blusbeasts.burry: These Living Sandstorms shoot sand blocks at their targets. Luckily they dry out in the sun and die.
lore.blusbeasts.grave: A more powerfull version of the burry. It makes spikes appear below you and throws boulders. These boulders sometimes contain treasure.
lore.blusbeasts.rootling: These little wood creatures spawn, when plants are left to decompose on the ground. They replant these plants and then disapear. If you help them, they may reward you.
lore.blusbeasts.deepshoveler: These Mole like monsters live deep within the underground, searching for ores to upgrade their shovel like hands. When digging ore they leave behind void ore. They hate light shooting projectiles that temporarily disables light sources and blinds mobs.
lore.blusbeasts.minersnack: These Fish live in caves. They all have different flavours that can help or hinder when eaten. They can be picked up with a right click.
lore.blusbeasts.dream_pixie: These pixies appear close to sleeping creatures and food plates when unseen. They eat the food from the plates and leave behind treasures and fairy dust.
effect.blusbeasts.pheromones.description: Makes all mobs around you aggro towards you.
death.attack.leach: %1$s was sucked dry by a Nether Leach.
blusbeasts.configuration.title: Blu's Beasts Config
blusbeasts.configuration.echoCrabGemGrow: If true, Echo Crabs will consume experience to regrow the echo shard on their backs.
blusbeasts.configuration.salamanderStack: If true, Salamanders smelt whole stacks instead of one item at a time.
blusbeasts.configuration.spawnamethystcr: If true, Amethyst Crabs spawn on growing Amethyst Buds.
blusbeasts.configuration.spawnrootling.t: If true, Rootlings spawn when Plant Items despawn.
blusbeasts.configuration.prayfinderdayre: The number of days that prayfinders can't spawn after world creation.
blusbeasts.configuration.effects_miner_b: Effects that Miner's Snacks can't spawn with.
item.blusbeasts.donut.tooltip_1: Has a faint aroma of a %s
